verdict: pass
findings_blocking: 0
finding: id=R1 scope=in_scope action=follow_up status=open severity=medium fix_role=none rationale=live kind:'gate' (main-session-gate running-set marker) is invisible to both the new co-open preconditions and the G4 merge fence (liveReadsAtMerge filters kind==='read' only, adaptive-node.js:5393) — a gate∥writer antichain plan can R1-co-open a leg group behind a live gate with no merge hold covering the gate window (pre-change that state held write_awaits_drain; the speculative close-hold covers only speculative:true members); same gate-blindness in tryR2bLeglessCoopen's liveReads filter (:4845). Practically fenced by the single-orchestrator discipline (the gate's observation window is the orchestrator's own work window) and requires a rare main-session-gate∥write antichain; follow-up: add a live-gate hold precondition and/or count kind:'gate' at the merge fence.
finding: id=R2 scope=in_scope action=follow_up status=open severity=low fix_role=none rationale=the plan's validation_test_consumes widening (testConsumedExtra) is not threaded into tryR2bLeglessCoopen's scratchObservableWriteSet call (adaptive-node.js:3861) — a self-hosting fork's extra test-consumed prose is admitted to the runtime R2b band; defense-in-depth only (the annotated gate's contract is scratch-only regardless); one-arg thread-through when touched next.

## What I verified (n2-review, code-reviewer, G1 cut vertex — read-only, zero files touched)

**1. R1 fail-closed matrix — VERIFIED.** The relaxation lives ONLY in the G2 else-branch (write-only frontier + non-empty running set, scripts/kaola-workflow-adaptive-node.js:4580-4644). Precedence traced: (1) !legCoupled → hold parallel_writes_off (G12); (2) liveGroupId → hold lane_group_live (G8); (3) parentCarriesProductionDirt non-pass → R2b attempt, else hold parent_dirty (G5, fail-closed on any non-pass); (4) selectSpeculativeWriteGroup empty-chosen → hold overlaps_live_writer / parallel_safe_indeterminate (G6/G7/G13 — the #599 fail-closed exclude-all on a crashed/garbled validator verdict is intact). Every hold returns BEFORE any mutation (ledger splice at :4833 and the running-set write are downstream); the envelope is {result, allDone, opened, reason, taskTransitions} with serialDegradeReason conditionally spread — byte-identical modulo the single additive field, no field on a null reason. All five rows pinned with zero-mutation assertions (test-adaptive-node.js #641-R1-A..E).

**2. The 17 must-not-relax guards — INTACT.** The adaptive-node diff is exactly 4 hunks (contract const, buildDispatch conditional attach, tryR2bLeglessCoopen, the else-branch + observesById); plan-validator is 3 (band predicates, parseNodes column, validatePlan checks + exports). G3 legless exclusivity (:4355) untouched — the #588 pin holds for legless writers via precondition (1) and is re-pinned under KAOLA_PARALLEL_WRITES=0 (#588-MIXED-LEGLESS-PIN). G4 merge_awaits_read_drain (:5393) untouched and re-pinned live (real-git co-run → last-member close refuses, zero mutation, w stays in_progress). G5/G6/G7/G8/G10/G16/G18/G19 all byte-untouched. G1 read-first partition unchanged (tick-1-reads pinned).

**3. R2a freeze grammar — VERIFIED.** observes is a ## Nodes column parsed in parseNodes (plan-validator.js:593) ⇒ inside computePlanHash's normalized NODES body (:1302-1306) ⇒ hash-covered; asserted directly (hash differs with/without the annotation). Refusals: unknown scope → observes_scope_unsupported; ANY role ≠ adversarial-verifier → observes_scope_role_invalid (stricter than the three named roles — code-reviewer/security-reviewer/main-session-gate all pinned e2e through the real validator + the handoff surfaces plan_invalid with the typed token, --freeze never shelled on refuse); write set present → observes_scope_not_read (double-covered by the pre-existing read-only-role check). Absent column ⇒ '' ⇒ old plans hash-stable (whole regression suite green confirms).

**4. Band predicate — CORRECT SEMANTICS.** isScratchObservableSurface = !testConsumes(...) && isAllowbandDocsSurface(...) — the allowband-docs slice MINUS #547 test-consumed prose, i.e. the isValidationInvisible SUBTRACTION semantics, NOT isBarrierInvisible (and deliberately narrower than isValidationInvisible itself: the workflow-state band is excluded per-path, only the writer's OWN .cache/{nodeId}.md folded in at set level; a foreign node's evidence file rejected — pinned). Admits docs/decisions/** + non-test-consumed docs/**; rejects docs/api.md, CHANGELOG.md, README.md (also docs/workflow-state-contract.md, docs/agents-source.md via SELF_HOST_TEST_CONSUMED), any production path; empty set vacuous-true; any miss disqualifies the whole set. 15 new assertions in test-validation-allowband.js.

**5. R2b consumer — VERIFIED.** Reached only inside the dirty-parent arm AFTER legCoupled + no-live-lane-group (so G12 kill-switch and G8 both gate R2b too). Fail-closed null (⇒ byte-identical parent_dirty hold) on: require/parseNodes failure, zero live reads, ANY live read not a freeze-declared observes:scratch adversarial-verifier (roles re-read from the FROZEN plan, not the running set), writer set not scratch-observable-safe. Co-open is legless (no groupForm, no leg — the writer sees the uncommitted context); from the next tick G3 excludes all further opens. Dispatch card: SCRATCH_OBSERVATION_CONTRACT attached iff observes==='scratch' via observesById parsed from the frozen plan (planContent in scope, :4833); non-scratch cards carry NO observation field (byte-identity pinned both ways). Matrix rows A–E pinned including docs/api.md-writer hold and annotated-gate∥production-writer hold.

**6. AC5 serial byte-identity — VERIFIED.** The no-running-set serial path (:4503-4579) is byte-untouched; test asserts single serial write open with NO serialDegradeReason field and no lane group under KAOLA_PARALLEL_WRITES=0.

**7. Cross-edition parity (#307) — GREEN.** edition-sync.js --check: 10 forge ports + 24 COMMON + 27 byte-groups in parity. validate-script-sync.js: OK incl. the adaptive-schema byte-identical group. Codex twins byte-identical (direct diff). gitlab/gitea ports carry the new tokens symmetrically (serialDegradeReason 7/7/7; observes/band tokens 4/4/4). adaptive-schema genuinely untouched — R1/R2 consume only pre-existing exports (parallelWritesDefaultOn, resolveFanoutCap); the observes grammar is validator-local. Walkthrough under-written per plan note; the AC3 pins (co-run, merge fence, fail-closed rows, mixed-set crash-reconcile) all live in test-adaptive-node.js with a REAL-git leg-provisioning harness.

**8. Provenance — CLEAN.** No #NNN/D-NNN in any shipped error string, reason token, or the dispatch contract string; refs confined to code comments (repo convention).

## Verdict
APPROVE — no CRITICAL/HIGH findings. The two findings above are genuine but non-blocking follow-ups (both concern the rare live main-session-gate / self-hosting-fork corners, neither weakens the shipped fail-closed matrix); n3-adversary may want to reproduce the gate-live shape when running the reproductions.
